title: Intensely Fatty German Ricotta Dumplings
description: A rich and indulgent German dish featuring ricotta, perfect for a special occasion or date night, this recipe is shojin-friendly and can be prepared with minimal effort.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, flour, eggs, melted butter, salt, and nutmeg, and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Bring the water to a boil in a large pot, then reduce the heat to a simmer.
Using a spoon, drop small pieces of the dough into the simmering water, making sure not to overcrowd the pot.
Poach the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve immediately.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or chives, if desired.
Serve the dumplings with your choice of sauce, such as a brown butter sage sauce or a simple tomato sauce.
